nodes.name: main.py
nodes.summary: Comprehensive Python test driver for RisingWave subscription cursor API, exercising snapshot, since-begin, since-now, table alter, block/fetch modes, and order-by behaviors.

nodes.name: test_cursor_snapshot_log_store
nodes.summary: Tests subscription cursor snapshot behavior with log store as the backing storage.

nodes.name: test_cursor_since_begin
nodes.summary: Tests subscription cursor reading all data since the beginning of the log.

nodes.name: test_cursor_since_now
nodes.summary: Tests subscription cursor reading only data inserted since cursor creation time.

nodes.name: test_cursor_without_since
nodes.summary: Tests subscription cursor behavior when no SINCE clause is specified.

nodes.name: test_cursor_since_rw_timestamp
nodes.summary: Tests subscription cursor starting from a specific RisingWave internal timestamp.

nodes.name: test_cursor_op
nodes.summary: Tests subscription cursor operation types including INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE events.

nodes.name: test_cursor_with_table_alter
nodes.summary: Tests subscription cursor behavior when the subscribed table schema is altered.

nodes.name: test_cursor_fetch_n
nodes.summary: Tests subscription cursor FETCH N batched retrieval of N rows at a time.

nodes.name: test_rebuild_table
nodes.summary: Tests subscription cursor behavior when the backing table is dropped and rebuilt.

nodes.name: test_block_cursor
nodes.summary: Tests subscription cursor in blocking mode waiting for new data to arrive.

nodes.name: test_order_table_with_pk
nodes.summary: Tests ordered subscription cursor for a table with primary key.

nodes.name: test_order_table_with_row_id
nodes.summary: Tests ordered subscription cursor for a table using row ID as the ordering key.

nodes.name: test_order_mv
nodes.summary: Tests ordered subscription cursor over a materialized view.

nodes.name: test_order_multi_pk
nodes.summary: Tests ordered subscription cursor for a table with composite primary key.

nodes.name: test_explain_cursor
nodes.summary: Tests EXPLAIN output for subscription cursor queries.

nodes.name: connection.slt
nodes.summary: SQLLogicTest verifying that RisingWave can be connected from Apache Superset.

nodes.name: basic.slt
nodes.summary: End-to-end SQLLogicTest for basic time travel query functionality in RisingWave.

nodes.name: index.slt
nodes.summary: End-to-end SQLLogicTest for time travel queries over indexed tables.

nodes.name: join.slt
nodes.summary: End-to-end SQLLogicTest for time travel queries involving JOIN operations.

nodes.name: license.slt
nodes.summary: End-to-end SQLLogicTest verifying license enforcement for time travel feature.

nodes.name: lookup_join.slt
nodes.summary: End-to-end SQLLogicTest for time travel queries using lookup joins.

nodes.name: syntax.slt
nodes.summary: End-to-end SQLLogicTest for time travel SQL syntax validation and error cases.

nodes.name: create_sources_kafka.slt.part
nodes.summary: SQLLogicTest fragment creating Kafka sources for TPC-H tables for streaming integration tests.

nodes.name: create_tables.slt.part
nodes.summary: SQLLogicTest fragment creating all TPC-H DDL table definitions for e2e tests.

nodes.name: drop_sources_kafka.slt.part
nodes.summary: SQLLogicTest fragment dropping Kafka sources created for TPC-H tests.

nodes.name: drop_tables.slt.part
nodes.summary: SQLLogicTest fragment dropping all TPC-H tables after tests.

nodes.name: insert_customer.slt.part
nodes.summary: SQLLogicTest fragment inserting TPC-H customer table seed data rows.

nodes.name: insert_lineitem.slt.part
nodes.summary: Large SQLLogicTest fragment inserting TPC-H lineitem table seed data (6007 lines).

nodes.name: insert_nation.slt.part
nodes.summary: SQLLogicTest fragment inserting TPC-H nation table seed data rows.

nodes.name: insert_orders.slt.part
nodes.summary: Large SQLLogicTest fragment inserting TPC-H orders table seed data (1502 lines).

nodes.name: insert_part.slt.part
nodes.summary: SQLLogicTest fragment inserting TPC-H part table seed data rows.

nodes.name: insert_partsupp.slt.part
nodes.summary: Large SQLLogicTest fragment inserting TPC-H partsupp seed data (702 lines).

nodes.name: insert_region.slt.part
nodes.summary: SQLLogicTest fragment inserting TPC-H region table seed data rows.

nodes.name: insert_supplier.slt.part
nodes.summary: SQLLogicTest fragment inserting TPC-H supplier table seed data rows.

nodes.name: produce_kafka.slt.part
nodes.summary: SQLLogicTest fragment producing TPC-H data rows to Kafka topics for streaming tests.

nodes.name: ttl.slt
nodes.summary: End-to-end SQLLogicTest for TTL (time-to-live) expiry on streaming table rows.

nodes.name: config.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo configuration for the embedded WASM UDF example, setting the compilation target to wasm32.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the embedded WASM UDF example crate with arrow_udf_wasm dependency.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Brief guide explaining how to build and use the embedded WASM UDF example.
